<a name="Importance"></a>
## type Importance

Importance defines the notification priority level.

```go
type Importance string
```

<a name="ImportanceDefault"></a>

```go
const (
    ImportanceDefault Importance = "DEFAULT"
    ImportanceHigh    Importance = "HIGH"
    ImportanceLow     Importance = "LOW"
    ImportanceMin     Importance = "MIN"
)
```

<a name="Notification"></a>
## type Notification

Notification defines the content and behavior of a system notification.

```go
type Notification struct {
    ID          int        `json:"id"`
    Title       string     `json:"title"`
    Body        string     `json:"body"`
    ChannelID   string     `json:"channel_id"`
    ChannelName string     `json:"channel_name"`
    Importance  Importance `json:"importance"`
}
```

<a name="NotificationPlugin"></a>
## type NotificationPlugin

NotificationPlugin handles posting system notifications.

```go
type NotificationPlugin struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="NotificationPlugin.Post"></a>
### func \(\*NotificationPlugin\) Post

```go
func (p *NotificationPlugin) Post(n Notification) (string, error)
```

Post triggers a system notification. If the ID is 0, a unique ID will be generated based on the current timestamp.
